justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions from the user, including specific times and days.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent only reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all user requests without unnecessary turns or redundant information gathering.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly fine, with the agent maintaining a professional tone and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search when the initial time slot was unavailable.
